blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
